task_description: Phase 1 secure backend: authentication (Argon2id + server-side sessions + TOTP MFA), RBAC middleware, Case CRUD with tenant isolation, integration tests with real Postgres, and CI update.

verification.summary: All 26 tests pass (10 auth + 11 cases + 5 health). Build (prisma generate + tsc) passes cleanly. Semantic review identified 5 issues; 2 critical ones fixed (cross-tenant case creation + register error handling). Remaining 3 are hardening items for a future iteration (MFA secret encryption, session invalidation on credential change, session cleanup job).
